mapper.select: SELECT dept_id, parent_id, ancestors, dept_name, order_num, leader, phone, email, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM sys_dept WHERE del_flag='0' AND dept_id != #{excludeId} ORDER BY parent_id, order_num
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{deptId} AND del_flag='0'
